description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard parcel box with a hinged lid, commonly used for shipping or packaging goods. The exterior is plain white, while the interior is a natural brown cardboard color, featuring a repeating pattern of small icons and some printed text. The box has flaps on the sides of the lid for secure closure and added structural integrity. The interior appears spacious and unobstructed, suitable for holding various items. The construction is typical of corrugated cardboard, providing moderate durability and protection for its contents. The overall design is utilitarian, focusing on function and ease of use for urban delivery or storage scenarios.
description: A plain white rectangular cardboard parcel box with a hinged lid and brown interior, designed for shipping or storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open box with the lid fully raised, revealing the patterned brown interior and spacious compartment.
description_view_1: Left-side angled view highlighting the thickness of the cardboard and the side flaps of the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the box and the lid's attachment, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Right-side angled view similar to view 1, showing the interior and the printed text on the bottom.
